setup_table.title: Place Ancient Books in Chiseled Bookshelves surrounding your Enchanting Table

first_enchant.title: Enchant an item using Immersive Enchanting's skill tree

subtitle.text: The bookshelf is doing more work than it looks like.

description: The Chiseled Bookshelf holds Ancient Books.
This is not magic — this is infrastructure.
The difference between random power and reliable power
is whether someone organized the knowledge first.
Must unlock I → II → III → IV sequentially.
Cannot jump to Efficiency IV early.
Enchanting costs materials now, not XP.
You need 15 Chiseled Bookshelves at full setup.
→ Craft 12 more Chiseled Bookshelves (15 total for max power)
→ Place Ancient Books around your Enchanting Table [check]
→ Enchant an item using the new skill tree [check]
